charter: Implement a concrete M17 eval/regression harness for governed CLI workflows. Add versioned sample scenarios and a Node test runner that validates prompt-pack/tool-call/permission-schema drift for tusq CLI workflows without network dependencies. Wire it into npm test and document usage. This is new product work beyond M1-M16; do not revalidate the old 44 criteria as sufficient.
acceptance_contract: Adds test fixtures for at least two governed CLI workflow scenarios
Adds an executable eval/regression runner under tests or scripts
Runner fails on schema/permission/tool-call expectation drift
Smoke/npm test executes the harness locally
Docs or planning artifacts record M17 scope and evidence

history.reason: planning artifacts for this intent already exist on disk; intent superseded during approval
